step.name: Step 1: Project timeline
step.text: Project timeline — Opus Builders walks you through our Luxury Pool Design and Build project timeline in Mount Washington. Opus Builders is a Los Angeles, California construction company offering residential and commercial design-build services, including custom luxury home construction, high-end renovations, and modern minimalist architectural design.
